title: The Northern Sanctuary
description: A fortress of stone and steam guards its secrets jealously.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: After a long train ride across the countryside, and a walk from a small mining town up a steep mountain path, you arrive at the Northern Sanctuary.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: This must be the place. The compass is pointing right at it.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: It looks heavily guarded, Vera. Look, guards, watchtowers. We can't just walk in.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Then we find another way. Da's in there.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: From the rocks, you study the sanctuary. Steam vents line the walls. Machinery clangs in the distance.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: There. A service entrance on the east side. It's used by workers. Maybe we can blend in.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: You arrive at the side entrance.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Inside, you see what looks like the inner workings of a large mechanical device down a long hallway.

closing.speaker: Addie
closing.text: It's like a clock, but wrong.

closing.speaker: Rainie
closing.text: It must be the time device?

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: They must be further along than Da thought.
